title: Li'l Miss Vampire Is Very Bad
overview: The new transfer student, Luna Ishikawa, is a vampire with a secret: she can't suck blood to save her life!

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and Sakuma-san
overview: Ishikawa's classmate, Eiko Sakuma, stumbles upon her practice session with Otori in the school library.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and the Sports Tournament / Li'l Miss Vampire and the Club Search
overview: Ishikawa battles an empty stomach in the middle of a basketball match. Ishikawa looks for a club to join.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and Cooking Class / Li'l Miss Vampire's Day Out
overview: Ishikawa bakes a pound cake for an assignment in class. Otori and Ishikawa go to the mall to eat udon.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and Kusunoki-san / Li'l Miss Vampire's Birthday
overview: Ishikawa learns more about her classmate, Misa Kusunoki. The students in 2-A celebrate Ishikawa's birthday.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire's Interview / Li'l Miss Vampire Visits Otori-kun
overview: Ishikawa is interviewed by the local newspaper. Ishikawa visits Otori's house to look at his paintings.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and Swimsuits
overview: With finals over and summer vacation on the horizon, Ishikawa goes shopping for a swimsuit with the girls.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and the Beach
overview: Otori, Ishikawa, and the rest of their class go on a day trip to the beach.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and the Start of Summer Vacation
overview: Summer vacation has begun, but the whole school is busy getting ready for the upcoming school festival.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and the School Festival
overview: It's time for Kashinokidai High School's annual festival, with food, games, and performances galore!

title: Li'l Miss Vampire and the After-Party / Li'l Miss Vampire's Surprise Plan
overview: Class 2-A meet up after the school festival at an okonomiyaki restaurant. Ishikawa plans a surprise party.

title: Li'l Miss Vampire's Present
overview: Ishikawa throws a birthday party for Otori at her house, with a special surprise present.
